title: Oil jumps 4% as doubts linger over U.S.-backed plan to protect Strait of Hormuz shipping
summary_full: Oil prices jumped 4% on Tuesday as uncertainty lingered over a U.S.-led coalition to protect shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Oil prices jumped 4% on Tuesday as uncertainty lingered over a U.S.-led coalition to protect shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
